NEXT_PUBLIC_SALEOR_API_URL.description: Your Saleor GraphQL API endpoint (e.g., https://your-store.saleor.cloud/graphql/)

APP_API_BASE_URL.description: Your app's public URL for webhooks (e.g., https://your-app.vercel.app)

APP_IFRAME_BASE_URL.description: Your app's public URL for iframe (usually same as APP_API_BASE_URL)

VNPAY_TMN_CODE.description: VNPay Terminal/Merchant Code (optional, can be set via UI)

VNPAY_HASH_SECRET.description: VNPay Hash Secret Key (optional, can be set via UI)
